context_notes: Session resumed at Phase 7 post-execution and drove the full close-out gate sequence (commit verify stamp → ROADMAP → code-review → regression → schema-drift → verifier → phase.complete → close-todos → PROJECT.md → VALIDATION.md audit). No mid-task work was open. Branch `ui-tests` at HEAD `0600bc6`. v2.0 milestone progress: 2 of 6 phases complete (Phase 6 tokens + Phase 7 layout). Anti-pattern advisory from earlier handoff still relevant for future executor agents: gsd-executor worktree isolation has drifted before (07-01 forked from old master base, 07-04 committed to main checkout) — spot-check `git -C <worktree> log` when resuming agents. The slim root layout now requires explicit <Suspense> around any client component using useSearchParams() (caught on /login during Phase 7 via fix(07-03) f8fa2f6) — keep in mind when Phase 8 adds Home Hub client components.
